{
    "cli": "edq.cli.config.list",
    "setup_funcs": [
        "edq.testing.cli.create_directory_structure",
    ],
    "arguments": [
        "--config-global", "global.json",
        "--show-origin",
    ],
    "work_dir": "__TEMP_DIR__()",
    "extra_options": {
        "directory_structure": [
            ["global.json", {
                "log_level": "DEBUG",
            }],
        ],
    },
}
---
Key	Value	Origin
log_level	DEBUG	<global config file (__TEMP_DIR__(global.json))>
